description_long: This is a side-by-side double-barrel shotgun with a short, sawed-off design, featuring two parallel steel barrels and a wooden grip. The barrels are metallic gray with visible wear and patina, suggesting frequent use or age. The grip and fore-end are made of dark, polished wood with engraved patterns, providing both aesthetic appeal and improved handling. The trigger guard is metallic and rounded, protecting the dual triggers beneath. The muzzle end shows the two open barrels, while the rear reveals the contoured wooden grip and the break-action hinge. This shotgun is compact and robust, suitable for close-quarters use in urban environments.
description: A compact, side-by-side double-barrel shotgun with a worn steel finish and engraved wooden grip, featuring a rounded trigger guard and break-action design.
description_view_0: Side view showing the full length of the double barrels, wooden grip, and metallic trigger guard.
description_view_1: Front view highlighting the two open barrels and the symmetry of the shotgun's muzzle.
description_view_2: Opposite side view displaying the barrels, wooden grip, and the break-action hinge.
description_view_3: Rear view focusing on the contoured wooden grip and the top of the break-action mechanism.
attribute_barrel_configuration: side-by-side double-barrel with no visible ribbing or venting, both barrels of equal length
attribute_trigger_guard_design: rounded metallic trigger guard of medium size, enclosing the triggers with no visible finger grooves or reinforcement
